title: Full-Stack Web Development Bootcamp
description: A comprehensive guide to becoming a full-stack developer. You will learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Next.js. Perfect for beginners and intermediate developers looking to level up.

description: Start your journey in data science. Learn Python, pandas, numPy, and build simple machine learning models to analyze datasets and draw insights.

description: Take your design skills beyond the basics. Learn advanced Figma techniques, prototyping, usability testing, and how to hand off designs to developers.

description: Learn what it takes to start a successful business. We cover ideation, market research, creating a business plan, and securing initial funding.

description: Master SEO, content marketing, and paid advertising. Build a robust online presence and learn how to convert traffic into loyal customers.

title: HTML Thoughts
content: Need to remember semantics and accessibility when writing HTML.

title: CSS Ideas
content: Look into CSS Grid vs Flexbox for the new dashboard layout.

title: JS Closures
content: Closures are tricky but powerful. Need to review lexical scoping.

title: React State
content: Always use functional updates when new state depends on old state.

title: Next.js Server
content: Server components are the default in the App Router. Use 'use client' only when needed.
